title: Rikutud hing. Viirus (The Virus)
overview: The film is about the love of a transgender woman and a woman in a society torn apart by a virus. In the apocalyptic world, one region is ruled by a gang that wants to break that love. The struggle for life and love begins.

trailers.title: Rikutud hing. Viirus trailer Transnaise seiklused lagunenud ühiskonnas ja ilus armastuslugu.
